description: Grade 1 English learning areas for listening, speaking, reading, and early writing.

learningAreas.title: Listening and Speaking
learningAreas.description: Listen carefully, answer simple questions, and speak clearly.

learningAreas.title: Reading Readiness
learningAreas.description: Recognise sounds, letters, words, and simple sentences.

learningAreas.title: Writing Readiness
learningAreas.description: Trace, copy, and write simple letters and words.

learningAreas.title: Language Use
learningAreas.description: Use simple words and sentence patterns in everyday communication.
